𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗜𝗧 | To provide a lightweight and efficient process supervisor and init system for Linux, especially in embedded environments.  🔥 Super Hot!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 C 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a lightweight and efficient process supervisor and init system for Linux, especially in embedded environments.
📅 Created: Sep 2012 • Updated: May 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Fast and simple init system
✅ Alternative to SysV init and systemd
✅ Designed for small and embedded Linux systems
✅ Can run on desktop and server systems
✅ Reverse engineered from EeePC fastinit


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 784 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 73 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 19 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Finit is a fast, simple init system for Linux, designed as an alternative to SysV init and systemd, particularly for small and embedded systems. It aims to provide a lightweight and efficient boot process.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/finit-project/finit

𝗡𝗘𝗧𝗪𝗢𝗥𝗞-𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗧-𝗖𝗟𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗧 | To provide users with a comprehensive desktop application for managing and analyzing Meshtastic mesh networks, offering insights beyond single-node management.  🔥 Super Hot!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a comprehensive desktop application for managing and analyzing Meshtastic mesh networks, offering insights beyond single-node management.
📅 Created: Oct 2022 • Updated: May 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Desktop client for Meshtastic devices
✅ Management of large, decentralized mesh networks
✅ Network-level management and analysis
✅ Connection-level insights
✅ Support for USB, IP, and Bluetooth connections
✅ Cross-platform compatibility (Windows, MacOS, Linux)


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

⭐⭐⭐ 452 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 44 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 45 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a desktop client for managing Meshtastic devices, enabling users to administer large, decentralized mesh networks. It focuses on network-level management and analysis, offering insights into connections and network health.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗬𝗚𝗘𝗡-𝗔𝗧𝗘𝗟𝗜𝗘𝗥 | Automated generation of storyboards and video content using AI models and video processing tools.  📈 Growing!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automated generation of storyboards and video content using AI models and video processing tools.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: May 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-assisted storyboard generation using Gemini (text and image models)
✅ Automated video generation by calling Vertex AI Veo for clips
✅ Video stitching using FFmpeg with quality preservation
✅ Integrated logs dashboard for tracking video and storyboard generation
✅ Gallery for managing saved storyboards and videos
✅ Built-in prompt guide for AI model interaction


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 788 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 123 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

StoryGen Atelier is an AI-powered tool that automates the creation of storyboards and videos. It leverages Google's Gemini for script and frame generation, Vertex AI's Veo model for video clip synthesis, and FFmpeg for final video assembly, incorporating features like logs and gallery management.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/0xsline/StoryGen-Atelier

𝗝𝗔𝗥𝗩𝗜𝗦 | A private, always-on AI assistant for everyday tasks and conversations that respects user data privacy.  📈 Growing!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A private, always-on AI assistant for everyday tasks and conversations that respects user data privacy.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: May 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 100% local processing (offline)
✅ Privacy-focused with automatic sensitive data redaction
✅ Natural conversational AI
✅ Context-aware responses
✅ Unlimited memory
✅ Web search capabilities
✅ Screen reading
✅ Chrome control
✅ Nutrition tracking
✅ Extensible with unlimited MCPs/tools
✅ Free offline dictation


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 925 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 166 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 77 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Jarvis is a 100% private, offline AI voice assistant that runs locally on your computer. It allows for natural conversational interaction, remembers context, and can integrate with various tools and applications without sending data to the cloud.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃
